name: Fighting Flame Swordsman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Flame Swordsman" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Flame Swordsman" or 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY, except "Fighting Flame Swordsman". You can only use each effect of "Fighting Flame Swordsman" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Flame Swordsman" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Flame Swordsman" or 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY, except "Fighting Flame Swordsman". You can only use each effect of "Fighting Flame Swordsman" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Flame Swordsman" from your Deck to your hand. action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
